description_long: This object is a small bird with an olive-green back, wings, and tail, and a yellowish underside with some mottled markings. The head is dark gray with a distinct white patch near the eye and a short, conical beak. The wings are compact and layered, with subtle brown and olive tones blending into the body. The legs and feet are slender and appear dark, tucked beneath the body. The tail is short and slightly rounded, with feathers that are closely packed. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and foraging in urban parks or gardens.
description: A small olive-green and yellow bird with a dark head, white eye patch, and short rounded tail. It has a compact body and conical beak.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive-green back, yellowish underside, white eye patch, and short beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the layered wings and short, rounded tail feathers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible yellow mottling on the underside and the dark head.
description_view_3: Front view showing the conical beak, white eye patch, and yellowish throat.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid olive-green back, yellow underside with mottling, white eye patch, and subtle brown wing markings
